evidence: "I like the healing and bonding at the end..."
"We watch a lot of disaster films, and this is one of our favs b/c it has good character development, romance, and a lot of excitement."
"Although the ending is predictable, it's still a fun ride."
"I like this film more each time I watch it..."
"...it was entertaining, cathartic, inspirational--a beautiful example of what a family can be..."
"...well acted film and has so much to offer."
"I like the continuation spinoff Major Crimes, and am a big fan of Mary McDonnell..."
"Kudos to Clint Eastwood for another great directing job..."
"...the chemistry of the whole cast makes it a delight to watch."
"...each one of our lives is a precious gift."
"...this film is a reminder of how important it is for young people to spend time with older folks..."
"...I appreciated this film and Jennifer Anniston's excellent portrayal."

summary: The user enjoys character-driven dramas with strong emotional themes, often centered around family dynamics and relationships. They appreciate high production quality and are drawn to stories that evoke deep feelings and personal connections.
